positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a group of woodland creatures (fox, badger, owl, rabbit) gathered under a glowing, crescent moon. The style is modern folk art with thick, clean lines and flat color blocking, reminiscent of Scandinavian children's book illustrations. Composition should be central and symmetrical, maximizing negative space for text overlay. Use a limited, autumnal color palette: burnt orange, deep navy blue, forest green, and cream. The creatures should be highly stylized with clean silhouettes and joyful, dynamic poses. Lighting should be soft and magical, emanating subtly from the moon and glowing forest flora. Perfect for a T-shirt print, high contrast, vector art quality.
